character.name: Full character spritesheet, tiny explorer in brown clothes, 32x32 pixel art style. Clear isolated sprites on a transparent-ready background. Sequences for: walking right, walking left, jumping, climbing up, and climbing down. Multiple frames per action. Organized in a clean grid, sharp pixel edges, no shadows, no background, no environment, flat 2D style, game assets only.
